untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of kurtosis and fat-tailed distributions (black swan events), which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is theoretically sound but cannot be operationalized with standard OHLCV indicators. High volatility (hvol_20) is used as a proxy for elevated tail risk, and trend direction (price vs SMA) as a proxy for momentum vs mean-reversion identification, but true kurtosis measurement and black swan event detection are missing.
translation_notes: Translated contextual signal using hvol_20 > 0.03 as proxy for high kurtosis/fat-tail regime. Entry logic is AND (both conditions required). Exit uses trend reversal. Direction remains CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long momentum and short mean-reversion strategies based on price position relative to SMA_20. Parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not specified in JSON as they require external calibration.
